note: Sprint 5.11: adds Trinity Web Miner Compute Console v0.1. Local file-based dashboard for daemon state, pending rewards, replay validations, governance batches and lessons. Shows live stock counters from loaded files only. No automatic payout, no wallet access, no network. website/trinity-useful-compute.html grows a top-level Miner Compute Console card with six loaders (daemon state JSON, events JSONL, pending reward JSONs multi, validation JSONs multi, governance batch JSONs multi, lessons/summary), four stock buckets (pending_unvalidated_stocks, replay_accepted_stocks, governance_approved_stocks, rejected_or_manual_review_stocks), approved_pending_reward_stocks headline shown in stocks AND in SOST, a per-task status table with status badges (pending / replay accepted / governance approved / mismatch / insufficient workers / manual review), an event timeline that tolerates malformed JSONL lines without crashing, a lessons aggregator that counts by (vertical, cause), Reset Console and Export Summary JSON buttons. Export emits TRINITY_MINER_CONSOLE_SUMMARY.json with safety_status (8 const-true flags) entirely client-side. All rendering uses textContent / createElement; the only innerHTML assignments are clears to empty string. No fetch, no XHR, no WebSocket, no EventSource, no sendBeacon, no eval, no document.write, no wallet/private-key/RPC/seed prompt phrases, no sensitive <input>. Tests: 29 new across tests/trinity/test_{trinity_web_miner_console,trinity_web_miner_console_safety}.py. Full trinity suite 384/384 PASS with materials-engine-private present. docs/TRINITY_WEB_MINER_COMPUTE_CONSOLE_V01.md. Badge bumped to v0.5 (worker + replay + governance + daemon + console). No consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet or wire-format change.
